tweets.text:
🇺🇸 The quarterly trade forecast confirms what we already knew: America’s farmers and ranchers are competing — and winning — again. 🚜

The agricultural trade deficit we inherited by the previous administration is down 42%! We remain steadfast and focused on getting back to a surplus.

And we’re just getting started. President Trump’s latest China agreement — which is not yet incorporated in the forecast — includes $30 BILLION of annual commitments to buy American #ag products (25MMT of soybeans + $17B of additional goods). 🌾🤝🇺🇸

At the same time, we’re diversifying and expanding markets worldwide and this year are forecasted to set RECORD EXPORTS to:
🇲🇽 Mexico
🇪🇺 EU
🇰🇷 South Korea
🇻🇳 Vietnam
🇨🇴 Colombia
🇹🇼 Taiwan
🇩🇴 Dominican Republic

author.description: The 33rd U.S. Secretary of Agriculture under the leadership of @POTUS Trump. 🌾
